shortDescription.en: Brazilian top sirloin cap steak, usually grilled with a fat cap and sliced thick or from a churrasco skewer.
shortDescription.zh: 巴西牛臀盖肉牛排，通常带脂肪盖烤制，厚切或从烤串上切下。
shortDescription.nl: Braziliaanse picanha, staartstuk met vetkap, gegrild en dik gesneden of van churrasco-spies.

cookingProfile.en: Expect beefy slices with a salty crust and fat cap, not a sauced steak.
cookingProfile.zh: 会是牛肉味明显、咸香外壳和脂肪盖，不是带酱牛排。
cookingProfile.nl: Verwacht rundvleesslices met zoute korst en vetkap, geen steak met saus.

description.en: Picanha is kept as a verified brazilian reference because its ordering cues are specific: beef fat cap, coarse salt, grill.
description.zh: 巴西烤牛臀肉 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：beef fat cap、coarse salt、grill。
description.nl: Picanha blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: beef fat cap, coarse salt, grill.

orderVerdict.en: A strong first choice for Brazilian barbecue; skip if fatty steak is not appealing.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃巴西烤肉时这是强首选；不喜欢带脂牛排则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Een sterke eerste keuze voor Braziliaanse barbecue; vermijd als vette steak niet aanspreekt.

shortDescription.en: Brazilian baked cassava or potato mash layered over shredded meat, often topped with cheese.
shortDescription.zh: 巴西烤焗木薯或土豆泥，下面夹肉丝，表面常有奶酪。
shortDescription.nl: Braziliaanse ovenschotel van cassave- of aardappelpuree met draadjesvlees en vaak kaas.

cookingProfile.en: Think shepherd's-pie-like comfort food with a soft starchy top and savory filling.
cookingProfile.zh: 可以理解为类似牧羊人派的家常菜，表面软糯，里面咸香肉馅。
cookingProfile.nl: Denk aan shepherd's-pie-achtig comfortfood met zachte zetmeellaag en hartige vulling.

description.en: Escondidinho is kept as a verified brazilian reference because its ordering cues are specific: cassava mash, shredded meat, melted cheese.
description.zh: 巴西木薯泥焗肉 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：cassava mash、shredded meat、melted cheese。
description.nl: Escondidinho blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: cassava mash, shredded meat, melted cheese.

orderVerdict.en: Good for a hearty baked comfort dish; skip if creamy mash and cheese feel too heavy.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃厚实烤焗家常菜时适合；觉得奶香泥和奶酪太重则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed voor stevige ovenschotel; vermijd als romige puree en kaas te zwaar zijn.

shortDescription.en: Brazilian lightly cured beef, often grilled or pan-fried and served with cassava, beans, or farofa.
shortDescription.zh: 巴西轻腌牛肉，常烤或煎，配木薯、豆类或 farofa。
shortDescription.nl: Braziliaans licht gezouten rundvlees, vaak gegrild of gebakken met cassave, bonen of farofa.

cookingProfile.en: Saltier and firmer than a plain steak, with rustic side dishes.
cookingProfile.zh: 比普通牛排更咸更有韧性，常配朴实主食。
cookingProfile.nl: Zouter en steviger dan gewone steak, met rustieke bijgerechten.

description.en: Carne de Sol is kept as a verified brazilian reference because its ordering cues are specific: salt-cured beef, cassava, farofa.
description.zh: 巴西风干牛肉 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：salt-cured beef、cassava、farofa。
description.nl: Carne de sol blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: salt-cured beef, cassava, farofa.

orderVerdict.en: Choose it for rustic salty beef; skip if you prefer tender mild steak.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃朴实咸香牛肉时适合；偏好嫩且温和的牛排则不推荐。
orderVerdict.nl: Kies dit voor rustiek zout rundvlees; sla over als je malse milde steak zoekt.

shortDescription.en: Bahian chicken stew with shrimp or dried shrimp, peanuts, coconut milk, and dendê palm oil.
shortDescription.zh: 巴伊亚鸡肉炖菜，常有虾或干虾、花生、椰奶和 dendê 红棕榈油。
shortDescription.nl: Bahiaanse kipstoof met garnaal of gedroogde garnaal, pinda, kokosmelk en dende-palmolie.

cookingProfile.en: Rich, nutty, and seafood-tinged, not a plain chicken curry.
cookingProfile.zh: 味道浓郁、坚果感明显且带海味，不是普通鸡肉咖喱。
cookingProfile.nl: Rijk, nootachtig en met zeevruchtentoon, geen gewone kipcurry.

description.en: Xinxim de Galinha is kept as a verified brazilian reference because its ordering cues are specific: dendê oil, shrimp, peanuts.
description.zh: 巴西花生椰香鸡 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：dendê oil、shrimp、peanuts。
description.nl: Xinxim de galinha blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: dendê oil, shrimp, peanuts.

orderVerdict.en: Good for a rich Bahian chicken stew; avoid with peanut or shellfish allergy.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃浓郁巴伊亚鸡肉炖菜时适合；花生或甲壳类过敏要避开。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed voor rijke Bahiaanse kipstoof; vermijden bij pinda- of schaaldiersallergie.

shortDescription.en: Brazilian black bean soup or small bean broth, often served as a bar snack with toppings.
shortDescription.zh: 巴西黑豆汤/小杯豆汤，常作为酒吧小食配料上桌。
shortDescription.nl: Braziliaanse zwartebonensoep of klein bonenbouillon, vaak als barsnack met toppings.

cookingProfile.en: Thick, earthy, and spoonable, usually lighter than a full feijoada.
cookingProfile.zh: 浓稠豆香、可用勺吃，通常比完整 feijoada 轻一些。
cookingProfile.nl: Dik, aards en lepelbaar, meestal lichter dan volledige feijoada.

description.en: Caldinho de Feijão is kept as a verified brazilian reference because its ordering cues are specific: black beans, garlic, lime.
description.zh: 巴西黑豆汤 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：black beans、garlic、lime。
description.nl: Caldinho de feijão blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: black beans, garlic, lime.

orderVerdict.en: Good as a small earthy bean soup; ask about pork if you avoid it.
orderVerdict.zh: 想喝小份豆香汤时适合；不吃猪肉要先问。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed als kleine aardse bonensoep; vraag naar varken als je dat vermijdt.

shortDescription.en: Brazilian small savory pie, often filled with chicken, shrimp, palm hearts, or cheese.
shortDescription.zh: 巴西小咸派，常见馅料有鸡肉、虾、棕榈芯或奶酪。
shortDescription.nl: Braziliaans klein hartig taartje, vaak gevuld met kip, garnaal, palmhart of kaas.

cookingProfile.en: A crumbly pastry snack with soft filling, not a sweet empanada.
cookingProfile.zh: 这是松酥咸派小食，内馅柔软，不是甜味 empanada。
cookingProfile.nl: Een kruimelige hartige pasteisnack met zachte vulling, geen zoete empanada.

description.en: Empada is kept as a verified brazilian reference because its ordering cues are specific: crumbly pastry, savory filling, chicken or shrimp.
description.zh: 巴西小馅饼 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：crumbly pastry、savory filling、chicken or shrimp。
description.nl: Empada blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: crumbly pastry, savory filling, chicken or shrimp.

orderVerdict.en: A friendly savory snack, but ask the filling if avoiding shrimp or dairy.
orderVerdict.zh: 这是友好的咸点心；避开虾或奶制品时要先问馅料。
orderVerdict.nl: Een toegankelijke hartige snack, maar vraag naar de vulling bij garnaal of zuivel.

shortDescription.en: Brazilian kibbeh-style bulgur and ground meat croquette, often fried and served with lime.
shortDescription.zh: 巴西 kibe，是布格麦和肉末做成的炸丸/炸条，常配青柠。
shortDescription.nl: Braziliaanse kibe: bulgur-gehaktkroket, vaak gefrituurd en met limoen.

cookingProfile.en: Crisp outside with a spiced meat-and-bulgur center.
cookingProfile.zh: 外层酥脆，里面是香料肉末和布格麦。

description.en: Brazilian Kibe is kept as a verified brazilian reference because its ordering cues are specific: bulgur, ground meat, mint.
description.zh: 巴西炸小麦肉球 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：bulgur、ground meat、mint。
description.nl: Braziliaanse kibe blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: bulgur, ground meat, mint.

orderVerdict.en: Good as a crisp savory snack; skip if bulgur/gluten or fried food is a problem.
orderVerdict.zh: 适合作为酥脆咸小食；不能吃布格麦/麸质或避开油炸则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed als krokante hartige snack; vermijd bij bulgur/gluten of gefrituurd eten.

shortDescription.en: Brazilian tapioca starch crepe, filled sweet or savory with cheese, coconut, meat, or condensed milk.
shortDescription.zh: 巴西木薯淀粉薄饼，可夹甜或咸馅，如奶酪、椰子、肉或炼乳。
shortDescription.nl: Braziliaanse tapiocapannenkoek van zetmeel, zoet of hartig gevuld met kaas, kokos, vlees of gecondenseerde melk.

cookingProfile.en: Chewy and gluten-free in texture, more elastic than a wheat crepe.
cookingProfile.zh: 口感有弹性且通常无麸质，比小麦薄饼更韧。
cookingProfile.nl: Taai en meestal glutenvrij van textuur, elastischer dan een tarwecrêpe.

description.en: Tapioca Crepe is kept as a verified brazilian reference because its ordering cues are specific: tapioca starch, cheese or coconut filling, condensed milk.
description.zh: 巴西木薯粉煎饼 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：tapioca starch、cheese or coconut filling、condensed milk。
description.nl: Tapiocapannenkoek blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: tapioca starch, cheese or coconut filling, condensed milk.

orderVerdict.en: Good if you want a chewy gluten-free-style crepe; ask whether the filling is sweet or savory.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃有嚼劲的木薯薄饼很适合；要先问馅料是甜还是咸。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed voor een taaie glutenvrije crêpe; vraag of de vulling zoet of hartig is.

shortDescription.en: Bahian seafood stew with coconut milk, dendê palm oil, peppers, tomato, cilantro, fish, and shrimp.
shortDescription.zh: 巴伊亚海鲜炖菜，含椰奶、dendê 红棕榈油、甜椒、番茄、香菜、鱼和虾。
shortDescription.nl: Bahiaanse zeevruchtenstoof met kokosmelk, dende-olie, paprika, tomaat, koriander, vis en garnalen.

cookingProfile.en: Creamy, orange-red, and aromatic, richer than the lighter Capixaba version.
cookingProfile.zh: 奶香、橙红、香气浓，比 Capixaba 版本更浓郁。
cookingProfile.nl: Romig, oranjerood en aromatisch, rijker dan de lichtere Capixaba-versie.

description.en: Moqueca Baiana is kept as a verified brazilian reference because its ordering cues are specific: dendê oil, coconut milk, fish.
description.zh: 巴伊亚椰奶海鲜锅 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：dendê oil、coconut milk、fish。
description.nl: Moqueca baiana blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: dendê oil, coconut milk, fish.

orderVerdict.en: Choose it for a rich coconut-palm-oil seafood stew; avoid with fish or shellfish allergy.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃浓郁椰奶棕榈油海鲜炖菜时适合；鱼类或甲壳类过敏要避开。
orderVerdict.nl: Kies dit voor rijke kokos-dende zeevruchtenstoof; vermijd bij vis- of schaaldiersallergie.

shortDescription.en: Espírito Santo-style fish stew with tomato, onion, cilantro, annatto color, and usually no coconut milk or dendê.
shortDescription.zh: 圣埃斯皮里图风格鱼炖菜，含番茄、洋葱、香菜和胭脂树色泽，通常不加椰奶或 dendê。
shortDescription.nl: Visstoof uit Espírito Santo met tomaat, ui, koriander en annattokleur, meestal zonder kokosmelk of dende.

cookingProfile.en: Lighter and brothier than Bahian moqueca, with clean fish and tomato flavors.
cookingProfile.zh: 比巴伊亚 moqueca 更轻、更清汤感，鱼和番茄味更清楚。
cookingProfile.nl: Lichter en bouillonachtiger dan Bahiaanse moqueca, met heldere vis- en tomatensmaak.

description.en: Moqueca Capixaba is kept as a verified brazilian reference because its ordering cues are specific: fish, tomato, cilantro.
description.zh: 番茄海鲜炖锅 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：fish、tomato、cilantro。
description.nl: Moqueca capixaba blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: fish, tomato, cilantro.

orderVerdict.en: Good for a lighter tomato-fish stew; skip if you expected creamy coconut moqueca.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃较清爽番茄鱼炖菜时适合；如果期待椰奶浓郁版则不对。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed voor lichtere tomaat-visstoof; sla over als je romige kokosmoqueca verwacht.

shortDescription.en: Brazilian shrimp in creamy sauce served inside a roasted pumpkin or squash.
shortDescription.zh: 巴西奶油虾酱装在烤南瓜里上桌。
shortDescription.nl: Braziliaanse garnalen in romige saus, geserveerd in geroosterde pompoen.

cookingProfile.en: Sweet squash and creamy shrimp are the main contrast, usually a rich centerpiece.
cookingProfile.zh: 主要对比是南瓜甜味和奶油虾酱，通常是较浓郁的中心菜。
cookingProfile.nl: Zoete pompoen en romige garnaal vormen het contrast, meestal een rijk middelpunt.

description.en: Camarão na Moranga is kept as a verified brazilian reference because its ordering cues are specific: shrimp, pumpkin, cream cheese.
description.zh: 南瓜奶油虾 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：shrimp、pumpkin、cream cheese。
description.nl: Garnalen in pompoen blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: shrimp, pumpkin, cream cheese.

orderVerdict.en: Great if creamy shrimp and sweet pumpkin sound appealing; avoid with shellfish allergy.
orderVerdict.zh: 喜欢奶油虾和甜南瓜组合会很适合；甲壳类过敏要避开。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed als romige garnaal met zoete pompoen aanspreekt; vermijden bij schaaldiersallergie.

shortDescription.en: Brazilian chicken salad with shredded chicken, vegetables, mayo, and often potato sticks or raisins.
shortDescription.zh: 巴西鸡肉沙拉，常有鸡丝、蔬菜、蛋黄酱，以及薯丝或葡萄干。
shortDescription.nl: Braziliaanse kipsalade met gerafelde kip, groente, mayo en vaak aardappelsticks of rozijnen.

cookingProfile.en: Cool, creamy, and crunchy-sweet in places, closer to a party salad than a leafy salad.
cookingProfile.zh: 冷食、奶香、局部脆甜，更像聚会沙拉，不是叶菜沙拉。
cookingProfile.nl: Koel, romig en deels knapperig-zoet, meer feestelijke salade dan bladsalade.

description.en: Salpicão is kept as a verified brazilian reference because its ordering cues are specific: shredded chicken, mayonnaise, raisins.
description.zh: 巴西鸡肉沙拉 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：shredded chicken、mayonnaise、raisins。
description.nl: Salpicão blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: shredded chicken, mayonnaise, raisins.

orderVerdict.en: Good if you like creamy chicken salad with sweet accents; skip if raisins in savory food bother you.
orderVerdict.zh: 喜欢带甜味点缀的奶香鸡肉沙拉时适合；介意咸食里有葡萄干则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed als je romige kipsalade met zoete accenten lust; vermijd als rozijnen in hartig eten storen.

shortDescription.en: Brazilian sweet hominy corn pudding with milk, sugar, cinnamon, and sometimes peanuts or coconut.
shortDescription.zh: 巴西甜玉米粒奶粥，含牛奶、糖、肉桂，有时加花生或椰子。
shortDescription.nl: Braziliaanse zoete maispap met melk, suiker, kaneel en soms pinda of kokos.

cookingProfile.en: Creamy and spoonable, often served warm for festivals but can also be chilled.
cookingProfile.zh: 奶香浓稠用勺吃，节庆时常热食，也可能冷食。
cookingProfile.nl: Romig en lepelbaar, vaak warm bij feesten maar soms ook koud.

description.en: Canjica is kept as a verified brazilian reference because its ordering cues are specific: hominy corn, milk, cinnamon.
description.zh: 巴西玉米椰奶甜粥 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：hominy corn、milk、cinnamon。
description.nl: Canjica blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: hominy corn, milk, cinnamon.

orderVerdict.en: A comforting corn-milk dessert; ask about peanuts if allergic.
orderVerdict.zh: 这是舒服的玉米牛奶甜品；花生过敏要先问是否添加。
orderVerdict.nl: Een troostrijk mais-melkdessert; vraag naar pinda bij allergie.

shortDescription.en: Brazilian coconut sweet made from coconut and sugar, sometimes chewy, creamy, or firm.
shortDescription.zh: 巴西椰子糖，用椰子和糖制成，可能有嚼劲、奶香或偏硬。
shortDescription.nl: Braziliaanse kokossnoep van kokos en suiker, soms taai, romig of stevig.

cookingProfile.en: Small and very sweet, more confection than cake.
cookingProfile.zh: 小份且很甜，更像糖果点心，不是蛋糕。
cookingProfile.nl: Klein en heel zoet, meer snoep dan cake.

description.en: Cocada is kept as a verified brazilian reference because its ordering cues are specific: coconut, sugar, condensed milk.
description.zh: 巴西椰子糖 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：coconut、sugar、condensed milk。
description.nl: Cocada blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: coconut, sugar, condensed milk.

orderVerdict.en: Good for a very sweet coconut bite; skip if coconut or high sweetness is not your thing.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃很甜的椰子小点时适合；不喜欢椰子或高甜度则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed voor een heel zoete kokosbite; vermijd als kokos of veel zoetheid niet past.

shortDescription.en: Brazilian coconut brigadeiro-style sweet made with condensed milk and coconut, often rolled in coconut.
shortDescription.zh: 巴西椰子版 brigadeiro 小甜球，用炼乳和椰子制成，外层常裹椰丝。
shortDescription.nl: Braziliaanse kokos-brigadeiro met gecondenseerde melk en kokos, vaak door kokos gerold.

cookingProfile.en: Soft, chewy, milky, and very sweet, usually served as a small party sweet.
cookingProfile.zh: 柔软有嚼劲、奶香且很甜，通常是小型聚会甜点。
cookingProfile.nl: Zacht, taai, melkachtig en heel zoet, vaak als klein feestzoet.

description.en: Beijinho is kept as a verified brazilian reference because its ordering cues are specific: condensed milk, coconut, butter.
description.zh: 巴西椰子奶糖球 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：condensed milk、coconut、butter。
description.nl: Beijinho blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: condensed milk, coconut, butter.

orderVerdict.en: Choose it for a small very sweet coconut-milk candy; skip if you prefer less sugar.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃小颗高甜椰奶糖时适合；偏好低甜则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Kies voor een klein heel zoet kokos-melksnoepje; vermijd als je minder suiker wilt.

shortDescription.en: Brazilian passion fruit mousse made with passion fruit, condensed milk, and cream.
shortDescription.zh: 巴西百香果慕斯，用百香果、炼乳和奶油制成。
shortDescription.nl: Braziliaanse passievruchtmousse met passievrucht, gecondenseerde melk en room.

cookingProfile.en: Cold, creamy, tangy-sweet, and usually lighter-feeling than caramel desserts.
cookingProfile.zh: 冷食、奶香、酸甜，通常比焦糖类甜点感觉更清爽。
cookingProfile.nl: Koud, romig en friszoet, meestal lichter dan karameldesserts.

description.en: Mousse de Maracujá is kept as a verified brazilian reference because its ordering cues are specific: passion fruit, condensed milk, cream.
description.zh: 百香果慕斯 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：passion fruit、condensed milk、cream。
description.nl: Passievruchtmousse blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: passion fruit, condensed milk, cream.

orderVerdict.en: A friendly dessert if you like tangy passion fruit and cream; skip with dairy allergy.
orderVerdict.zh: 喜欢百香果酸甜和奶油感的话很友好；奶制品过敏要避开。
orderVerdict.nl: Een toegankelijk dessert als je frisse passievrucht en room lust; vermijden bij zuivelallergie.

shortDescription.en: Brazilian tapioca pudding with tapioca pearls or starch, milk or coconut milk, sugar, and coconut.
shortDescription.zh: 巴西木薯甜布丁，含木薯粒或淀粉、牛奶或椰奶、糖和椰子。
shortDescription.nl: Braziliaanse tapiocapudding met tapiocaparels of zetmeel, melk of kokosmelk, suiker en kokos.

cookingProfile.en: Soft, slippery, and creamy, with a noticeable tapioca chew.
cookingProfile.zh: 柔软滑润奶香，木薯颗粒或粉感带明显弹性。
cookingProfile.nl: Zacht, glibberig en romig, met duidelijke tapiocakauw.

description.en: Brazilian Tapioca Pudding is kept as a verified brazilian reference because its ordering cues are specific: tapioca, coconut milk, milk.
description.zh: 巴西木薯布丁 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：tapioca、coconut milk、milk。
description.nl: Braziliaanse tapiocapudding blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: tapioca, coconut milk, milk.

orderVerdict.en: Good if you like creamy tapioca texture; skip if slippery pearls bother you.
orderVerdict.zh: 喜欢木薯布丁滑弹口感时适合；介意滑溜颗粒则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed als je romige tapiocatextuur lust; vermijd als glibberige parels storen.

shortDescription.en: Slow-cooked fava beans with olive oil, lemon, cumin, garlic, and fresh toppings.
shortDescription.zh: 慢煮蚕豆配橄榄油、柠檬、孜然、蒜和新鲜配料。
shortDescription.nl: Langzaam gegaarde tuinbonen met olijfolie, citroen, komijn, knoflook en frisse toppings.

cookingProfile.en: Usually served warm as a thick bean bowl or dip, often eaten with bread.
cookingProfile.zh: 通常温热上桌，是浓厚豆碗或蘸酱，常配面包吃。
cookingProfile.nl: Meestal warm als dikke bonenkom of dip, vaak met brood gegeten.

description.en: Foul Medames is kept as a verified middle-eastern reference because its ordering cues are specific: fava beans, olive oil, lemon.
description.zh: 中东蚕豆泥 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：fava beans、olive oil、lemon。
description.nl: Foul medames blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: fava beans, olive oil, lemon.

orderVerdict.en: A reliable bean-based breakfast or starter; skip if you want meat or dislike earthy beans.
orderVerdict.zh: 这是稳的豆类早餐/前菜；想吃肉或不喜欢豆香则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Een betrouwbare bonenontbijt- of starteroptie; vermijd als je vlees wilt of aardse bonen niet lust.
